text.start: Mina is looking for a Branch from the Bear corner.
text.progress: Mina smiles. The Branch near the Bear corner would be just right.
text.complete: Mina takes the Branch and shares a few town coins.
text.already_completed: Mina waves. The Branch is already tucked into her tiny bookmark.

memory_story.story_memory: Mina uses a small branch from the Bear corner as a bookmark.
memory_story.visual_hook: a branch beside the Bear book corner
memory_story.review_path: Walk to the Bear anchor, pick up a branch, then return to Mina.
